revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 9 (old calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 9 (old calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月9日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * （[[755年]]_月_日） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐 (王朝)|唐]]の節度使・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に * [[寛永]]12年<!--（[[1635年]]_月_日）--> - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14年<!--（[[1637年]]_月_日）--> - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5年<!--（[[1872年]]_月_日）--> - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月8日 (旧暦)|11月8日]] 翌日[[11月10日 (旧暦)|11月10日]] - 前月[[10月9日 (旧暦)|10月9日]] 翌月[[12月9日 (旧暦)|12月9日]] *新暦[[11月9日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月9日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[755年]][[12月16日]]） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐]]の[[節度使]]・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * [[寛永]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1635年]][[12月18日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1637年]][[12月25日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月9日]]） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|8|11|10|10|9|12|11|1109}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月9日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{Lunar November}} '''November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 9'''<!--Lunar November9--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[755年]][[12月16日]]） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐]]の[[節度使]]・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * [[寛永]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1635年]][[12月18日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1637年]][[12月25日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月9日]]） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|8|11|10|10|9|12|11|1109}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 9 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

{{Lunar November}} '''November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 9'''<!--Lunar November9 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[755年]][[12月16日]]） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐]]の[[節度使]]・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * [[寛永]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1635年]][[12月18日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1637年]][[12月25日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月9日]]） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|11|8|11|10|10|9|12|11|1109}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の9日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天宝}}14年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|755|ja|755}} {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}） – 安史の乱が起こり、唐の節度使であった安禄山と史思明が蜂起して内乱状態となった. * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1635|ja|1635}} {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}） – 江戸幕府は寺社奉行を設置した. * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}） – 江戸幕府は島原の乱鎮圧のため、板倉重昌らを派遣した. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 9|ja|12月9日}}） – 明治政府は、12月2日（旧暦）の翌日をもって太陰太陽暦を廃止し、太陽暦の採用を決定した.
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|8|11|10|10|9|12|11|1109}}

[[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の9日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天宝}}14年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|755|ja|755}} {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}） – 安史の乱が起こり、唐の節度使であった安禄山と史思明が蜂起して内乱状態となった. * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1635|ja|1635}} {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}） – 江戸幕府は寺社奉行を設置した. * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}） – 江戸幕府は島原の乱鎮圧のため、板倉重昌らを派遣した. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 9|ja|12月9日}}） – 明治政府は、12月2日（旧暦）の翌日をもって太陰太陽暦を廃止し、太陽暦の採用を決定した.
== Births ==
== Deaths ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|8|11|10|10|9|12|11|1109}}

[[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]]14th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[755]][[12月16日]]） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐]]の[[節度使]]・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * [[寛永]]12nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1635]][[12月18日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1637]][[12月25日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[12月9日]]） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定

[[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]]14th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[755]][[12月16日]]） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐]]の[[節度使]]・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * [[寛永]]12nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1635]][[12月18日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1637]][[12月25日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[12月9日]]） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定
== Births ==
== Deaths ==

[[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]] 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[12月16日]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[12月18日]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[12月25日]] ） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[12月9日]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

[[sn:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]] 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[12月16日]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[12月18日]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[12月25日]] ） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[12月9日]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]] 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[December 16]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[December 18]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[December 25]] ） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 9]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

[[sn:November 9 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 9일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] [[zh:十一月初九]] [[en:draft:November 9 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tianbao|ja|天宝 (唐)|ko|천보 (당)|zh|天宝 (唐朝)}} 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[December 16]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[December 18]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[December 25]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 9]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tianbao|ja|天宝 (唐)|ko|천보 (당)|zh|天宝 (唐朝)}} 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[December 16]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[December 18]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[December 25]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 9]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

== Events == * {{ill|Tianbao|ja|天宝 (唐)|ko|천보 (당)|zh|天宝 (唐朝)}} 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[December 16]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[December 18]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[December 25]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 9]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

== Events == * {{ill|Tianbao|ja|天宝 (唐)|ko|천보 (당)|zh|天宝 (唐朝)}} 14th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[755]] [[December 16]] ） - [[安史の乱]] 。[[唐]] の[[節度使]] ・[[安禄山]] 、[[史思明]] が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1635]] [[December 18]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[寺社奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1637]] [[December 25]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが[[島原の乱]] の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]] らを派遣 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[December 9]] ） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]] の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]] を廃止して[[太陽暦]] を採用することを決定

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初九]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[755]] – {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ({{ill|Jiedushi|ja|節度使}}) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1635]] – {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ({{ill|Jisha Bugyō|ja|寺社奉行}}). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1637]] – {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] – {{ill|December 9|ja|12月9日}}): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

== Deaths == <!-- None -->

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月9日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の9日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天宝 (唐)|天宝]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[755年]][[12月16日]]） - [[安史の乱]]。[[唐]]の[[節度使]]・[[安禄山]]、[[史思明]]が蜂起。内乱状態に。 * [[寛永]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1635年]][[12月18日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[寺社奉行]]を設置 * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1637年]][[12月25日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[島原の乱]]の鎮圧に[[板倉重昌]]らを派遣 * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月9日]]） - 明治政府が、この年の[[12月2日 (旧暦)|12月2日]]の翌日から[[太陰太陽暦]]を廃止して[[太陽暦]]を採用することを決定
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|8|11|10|10|9|12|11|1109}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840318]] Wikidata name: 9th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 9|qq=November 9}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. == Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:755|755]] – [[:en:December 16|December 16]]): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. == Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:755|755]] – [[:en:December 16|December 16]]): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:755|755]] – [[:en:December 16|December 16]]): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:755|755]] – [[:en:December 16|December 16]]): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初九]][[zh:十一月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初九]][[zh:十一月初九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初九]][[zh:十一月初九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840318]] Wikidata name: 9th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 9|qq=November 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:755|755]] – [[:en:December 16|December 16]]): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:755|755]] – [[:en:December 16|December 16]]): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ([[:en:Jiedushi|Jiedushi]]) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1635|1635]] – [[:en:December 18|December 18]]): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ([[:en:Jisha-bugyō|Jisha Bugyō]]). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1637|1637]] – [[:en:December 25|December 25]]): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] – [[:en:December 9|December 9]]): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

{{Not to be confused with|November 9|qq=November 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|755|en|755|WD=Q23650|lt=755}} – {{ill|December 16|en|December 16|WD=Q2410|lt=December 16}}): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ({{ill|Jiedushi|en|Jiedushi|WD=Q1688932|lt=Jiedushi}}) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1635|en|1635|WD=Q6879|lt=1635}} – {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18}}): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ({{ill|Jisha-bugyō|en|Jisha-bugyō|WD=Q1036279|lt=Jisha Bugyō}}). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1637|en|1637|WD=Q6889|lt=1637}} – {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25}}): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} – {{ill|December 9|en|December 9|WD=Q2304|lt=December 9}}): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.

== Events == * In the 14th year of the Tianbao era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|755|en|755|WD=Q23650|lt=755|1=755}} – {{ill|December 16|en|December 16|WD=Q2410|lt=December 16|1=December 16}}): The An Shi Rebellion erupted. In the Tang Dynasty, the military governor ({{ill|Jiedushi|en|Jiedushi|WD=Q1688932|lt=Jiedushi|1=Jiedushi}}) An Lushan and his subordinate Shi Siming rose in revolt, plunging the empire into civil strife. * In the 12th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1635|en|1635|WD=Q6879|lt=1635|1=1635}} – {{ill|December 18|en|December 18|WD=Q2438|lt=December 18|1=December 18}}): The Tokugawa shogunate established the Temple and Shrine Commissioner ({{ill|Jisha-bugyō|en|Jisha-bugyō|WD=Q1036279|lt=Jisha Bugyō|1=Jisha-bugyō}}). * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1637|en|1637|WD=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}} – {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|WD=Q2745|lt=December 25|1=December 25}}): The Tokugawa shogunate dispatched Itakura Shigemasa and others to suppress the Shimabara Rebellion. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} – {{ill|December 9|en|December 9|WD=Q2304|lt=December 9|1=December 9}}): The Meiji government decided to abolish the traditional lunisolar (Taiyin-Taiyang) calendar—effective from the day after December 2 of that year—and adopt the solar calendar.
